scenarios.name: baseline — lending widget ready, APY visible, execute disabled

expected.notes: No execution; assert widget + supply APY render cleanly with empty input.

scenarios.name: LEND 10 ETH — verify aToken output, execute, trade row added

expected.notes: Supply leg — ETH deposited on Aave V3, aETH receipt visible before execute.

scenarios.name: WITHDRAW 5 ETH — verify output includes yield, execute, trade row added

expected.notes: Partial withdrawal — output ETH >= 5 * 0.99 confirming yield accrual.

scenarios.name: BORROW 5 ETH — verify health factor decreases, execute, trade row added

expected.notes: Borrow leg — projected HF must be < current HF (risk increases with debt).

scenarios.name: REPAY 5 ETH — verify health factor recovers, execute, trade row added

expected.notes: Repay leg — projected HF must be > current HF (risk decreases as debt is cleared).
